nasb.text: But we had to celebrate and rejoice, for this brother of yours was dead and has begun to live, and was lost and has been found.’ ”

esv.text: It was fitting to celebrate and be glad, for this your brother was dead, and is alive; he was lost, and is found.’”

cnv.text: 只是因為你這個弟弟是死而復活、失而又得的，我們應該歡喜快樂。’”

ccb.text: 可是你弟弟是死而复活、失而复得的，所以我们应该欢喜快乐。’”

csbs.text: 现在，我们应该庆祝、欢喜，因为你这个弟弟是死而复生、失而复得的。’”
